name: Tomatoes Stuffed with Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a 1/2 inch slice off top of each tomato; reserve for other uses.
2. Carefully scoop out pulp, leaving shells intact. Reserve pulp for other uses. Invert shells on paper towels to drain.
3. Cook broccoli according to package directions; drain.
4. Position knife blade in food processor bowl; add broccoli and remaining ingredients to bowl, and process until smooth.
5. Spoon broccoli mixture evenly into tomato shells.
6. Place stuffed tomatoes in a lightly greased 9 inch square baking dish.
7. Bake at 400°F for 10 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
